news.title: Order Books, Inventories and Capacity Utilisation Survey  on the Manufacturing sector for Q3:2025-26
news.india_relevance: This is the primary data source for understanding the health and operational efficiency of India's manufacturing backbone.
news.why_it_matters:
It reveals the actual capacity utilization levels, which dictates when the next private capex cycle will kick in.
Low utilization suggests a slowdown, while high levels signal impending industrial expansion.

news.title: Urban Consumer Confidence Survey
news.india_relevance: Measures the sentiment of India's urban population, which drives over 50% of the country's private consumption.
news.why_it_matters:
Consumer confidence is a leading indicator for discretionary spending in sectors like auto, tech, and retail.
It provides a direct pulse on job security and income perceptions among the middle class.

news.title: Households’ Inflation Expectations Survey
news.india_relevance: Captures how Indian families perceive future price rises, which directly influences their current spending and saving behavior.
news.why_it_matters:
Inflation expectations are often self-fulfilling; if households expect higher prices, they demand higher wages.
This data is a critical input for the RBI's interest rate decisions.

news.title: MUFG takes 20% stake in Shriram Finance for ₹39,618 crore in India’s largest cross-border financial deal
news.india_relevance: A massive vote of confidence in India's NBFC sector and the creditworthiness of the 'missing middle' of borrowers.

news.title: The Uranium Alchemy! What is a Fast Breeder? Why India just became one of only two countries to master the complex tech
news.india_relevance: India's energy security depends on its three-stage nuclear program, and this milestone is the critical second stage.
news.why_it_matters:
Fast Breeder Reactors allow India to utilize its vast thorium reserves, reducing long-term dependence on imported uranium.
Mastering this tech places India at the global forefront of sustainable, high-output baseload power.

news.title: Mint Explainer | Has the food processing PLI scheme delivered on its promise?
news.india_relevance: Evaluates the effectiveness of a multi-billion dollar government subsidy aimed at making India a global food export hub.
news.why_it_matters:

news.why_it_matters:
